memoryArtifacts.headline: Page 627. Bulkeley of Cheadle-Bulkeley and Beaumaris. Vol III, 1882. George Omerod
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 627. Vol III. 1882
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle於大約1312年出生在英國爾達文哈姆時，他的父親Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley44歲，母親Felice Butler34歲。他於大約1327年與Agnes de Cheadle在英國爾布爾可勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1350年之前在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle于大约1312年出生在英国爾達文哈姆时，他的父亲Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley44岁，母亲Felice Butler34岁。他于大约1327年与Agnes de Cheadle在英国爾布爾可勒结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1350年之前在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle was born about 1312, in Davenham, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, was 44 and his mother, Felice Butler, was 34. He married Agnes de Cheadle about 1327, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died before 1350, in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle est né environ 1312, à Davenham, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Felice Butler, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Cheadle environ 1327, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé avant 1350, à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle um 1312 in Davenham, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley 44 und seine Mutter Felice Butler 34. Er hat um 1327 in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England Agnes de Cheadle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb vor 1350 in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle è nato il circa 1312 nel Davenham, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Felice Butler, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Cheadle circa 1327, nel Bulkeley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì prima del 1350, nel Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Bulkeley of Cheadleが約1312年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンハムで生まれた時，父Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeleyは44歳，母Felice Butlerは34歳であった。約1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーでAgnes de Cheadleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1350年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle(이)가 대략 1312년 영국 체실르 대븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Felice Butler(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1327년 영국 체실르 버켈리에서 Agnes de Cheadle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1350년 이전 영국 체실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle nasceu aproximadamente 1312, em Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Felice Butler, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Cheadle aproximadamente 1327, em Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1350, em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle родился около 1312 г. в местности давенам, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Felice Butler, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Cheadle около 1327 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер перед 1350 г. в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Bulkeley of Cheadle nació aproximadamente 1312, en Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Felice Butler, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Agnes de Cheadle aproximadamente 1327, en Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió antes de 1350, en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
